name: Salzburger Nockerl
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Butter, unsalted, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Place 4 shallow 9-inch oval gratin dishes on a baking sheet.
3. In each dish, place 1 teaspoon of jelly, 1 tablespoon of cream, and 1 piece of butter.
4. In a mixer, beat the egg whites on medium-high speed until they form soft peaks.
5. Gradually add vanilla sugar and lemon juice, continuing to beat until stiff and shiny.
6. Using a large rubber spatula, gently fold egg yolks and flour into the beaten whites.
7. Use a spatula to transfer 3 large mounds of the mixture to each baking dish; shape and smooth them.
8. Bake until puffed and golden (about 8 minutes).
9. Serve immediately.
